title: Xtra Tender Turkish Potato Icli Kofte
description: A peppery and tender Turkish dish featuring potato starch, perfect for a quick-fix meal, made Jain-friendly by using plant-based ingredients, and formed into icli kofte
instructions: Preheat the sous-vide machine to 180 degrees Fahrenheit.
Mix the potato starch, all-purpose flour, chopped onion, minced garlic, black pepper, and salt in a large bowl.
Gradually add the olive oil and water to the bowl and mix until a dough forms.
Knead the dough for 5 minutes until it becomes smooth and pliable.
Divide the dough into 8 equal pieces and shape each piece into a ball.
Use your thumb to make a hole in the center of each ball and shape into icli kofte.
Place the icli kofte in the sous-vide machine and cook for 30 minutes.
Remove the icli kofte from the sous-vide machine and serve hot.
